word: G1625 - ἐκτρέφω - ektréphō - ek-tref'-o - Bring up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκτρέφω

- Transliteration: Ektrepho

- Phonetic: ek-tref'-o

- Definition:

1. to nourish up to maturity, to nourish

2. to nurture, bring up

- Origin: from G1537 and G5142

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5142; to rear up to maturity that is (generally) to cherish or train: - bring up nourish.
